occupation: Ad-Tech, Adops, Metrics, pDOOH and Business Development at RZK Digital
headline: Know-how and best-in-class ad-tech for planning and execution of digital-out-of-home (DOOH) networks.
summary:
Head of Ad-Tech and Programmatic DOOH (pDOOH) at RZK Digital, a leading DOOH network operator based in São Paulo, Brazil.

Technology & Metrics Director at ABOOH — the Brazilian Out of Home Association.

Yuri is a computer engineer and seasoned Sales & Business Development executive with a strong track record in digital out-of-home (DOOH), pro-AV, and urban mobility sectors. He brings deep expertise in digital strategy, M&A, negotiation, R&D, business planning, product development, and sales management.

A tech pioneer in Brazil and Latin America, Yuri has been at the forefront of innovations in broadband internet, digital convergence, large-format and e-cinema, drones/UAVs, digital signage/DOOH, computer vision for retail, and engineering for light electric vehicles. He previously served as a shareholder in a digital signage joint venture with Panasonic.

experiences.title: Ad-Tech, Adops, Metrics, pDOOH and Business Development
experiences.description:
RZK Digital is a next-generation DOOH network operator that integrates state-of-the-art ad-tech with consumers in real-world environments. The company connects brands and agencies to high-impact digital out-of-home inventory through data-driven, privacy-first solutions designed for both direct and programmatic buying.

Yuri was responsible for the foundational design and implementation of RZK’s ad-tech stack, including the CMS architecture, the deployment of a first-party sensor network, and the supporting data systems across the campaign lifecycle. Beyond technology, he structured the operational backbone of the delivery side of the business, defining workflows, processes, and governance across sales operations, ad-tech, metrics, and programmatic DOOH (pDOOH), ensuring consistent execution from commercial strategy to on-screen delivery.

Working alongside international consultants, Yuri also led the deployment of a first-of-its-kind DOOH measurement engine with an omnichannel mindset, aligned with global standards from the IAB, DPAA, and the World Out of Home Organization. This framework positioned RZK as a regional reference in audience measurement and accountability, reflecting the growing convergence between digital, data-centric advertising and the DOOH ecosystem.

experiences.company: ABOOH - Associação Brasileira de Out of Home
experiences.title: Head of Metrics / Diretor de Métricas – ABOOH
experiences.description:
Leading the Metrics Committee to establish and evolve national standards for DOOH data, measurement, and transparency.
Main initiatives include:

Design and governance of the ABOOH XML standard for interoperability and data validation across the ecosystem.

Organizer for the ABOOH Measurement Guidelines, coordinating the steps and collaboration needed to bring the framework to life.

Speaker in ESPM’s ABOOH course, as well as in webinars and industry roundtables on metrics, programmatic, brand safety, data ethics, and innovation.

Focus areas: data standardization, privacy, transparency, and education in the Brazilian programmatic DOOH market.

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
BrasOOH is an R&D-driven ad-tech startup providing strategic support and technical services to media agencies for the planning and execution of out-of-home (OOH) and digital out-of-home (DOOH) campaigns.

Functioning as an outsourced ad-tech arm for media reps and specialist agencies, BrasOOH helped navigate complex campaign planning and digital transformation challenges at scale. The company positioned itself as a future-proof ad-tech partner, fully compliant with both Brazilian and international privacy regulations.

experiences.title: Business and Technology Consultant - Panasonic Innovation Center Brazil
experiences.description:
Yuri played a leading role in strategy, sales, and innovation at DFS (Digital Full Service), Brazil’s top digital signage integration specialist, which culminated in an M&A with Panasonic Brazil.
Following the merger, he served both as a shareholder at DFS and as a digital signage consultant for the Panasonic Innovation Center, contributing to projects across Latin America and the U.S.

As a Panasonic services subsidiary, DFS delivered full-service digital signage solutions for retail, hospitality, and corporate communication verticals. Yuri’s role spanned the development of critical business areas including:

- Content and network managed services
- Nationwide field services for installation and maintenance
- Content production and creative development
- Innovation delivery for large-scale networks
- Hardware sales, procurement, and vendor negotiations
- Software development and lab capabilities
- Interactive kiosks, video analytics, AV automation, video conferencing, and POS systems
- In sales and business development, Yuri played a fundamental role in acquiring key accounts and supporting sales initiatives across the region.

experiences.title: Vice President Business Product Development
experiences.description:
SOMA Veículos Elétricos became Brazil’s leading light electric vehicle development firm, formally originating in 2013 as the startup Guell in Salvador, Bahia, after receiving FAPESB government funding. SOMA relocated to São Paulo in 2015. The company focuses on research, product development, and market entry for innovative mobility solutions. SOMA was selected to participate in prominent R&D programs by CNPq, FINEP, and the Ministry of Science and Technology (MCTI), through the prestigious innovation acceleration initiative Startup Brasil.

The company’s first product, the e-scooter SURFER, is showcased at www.gosurfer.com.br. Yuri played a fundamental role in the company’s launch, securing R&D funding and leading marketing efforts, while also contributing directly to product development. He is a co-author of SOMA’s product designs and technological inventions.

experiences.title: Franchising General Manager
experiences.description:
Yuri led the franchising division of a Brazilian nationwide vehicle tracking startup, taking a key role in defining and executing the company’s go-to-market strategy.

Key responsibilities and achievements:
- Proposed and developed the franchise model as the company’s core expansion strategy
- Built the initial franchise sales pipeline and led the franchise team
- Advised on product development and innovation strategy

Controle Monitoramento was an early-stage startup. Yuri held a leadership position until the company ceased operations in late 2012 due to regulatory issues.

experiences.title: Sales Director Central & South America
experiences.description:
Led regional strategy, business development, and sales for BroadSign’s operations in Central and South America.

Key achievements:
- Achieved market leadership in Digital Signage SaaS across the region within 2 years
- Positioned BroadSign as the benchmark digital signage platform in Latin America
- Influenced local business models that are still in use today
- Bridged local companies with international know-how, supporting the foundation of the Brazilian, Colombian, and Mexican Digital Signage Associations
- Reached breakeven in the region within 6 months and ROI within 12 months

experiences.company: Ya Mogu Network Management and Innovations
experiences.title: Director, Chief Technology Officer
experiences.description:
Served as CTO at Brazil’s first digital signage integrator, leading groundbreaking projects that helped define the early DOOH landscape in the country.

Key milestones:
- Launched the first digital signage retail project in Brazil with VTV, deployed in Casa e Vídeo stores
- Deployed the first bar and restaurant network (Conversa Fiada), integrating early mobile and Bluetooth-based audience engagement
- Executed the first government digital signage project (State of Rio de Janeiro)
- Delivered the first large-scale convenience store deployment
- Provided technical and business consulting for pioneering Brazilian projects across multiple verticals, including transit (buses), shopping malls, hospitality, and corporate communications

experiences.title: Business Development Manager
experiences.description:
- Sale of IMAX theatres to a leading Brazilian cinema chain, in operation to this day.
- Startup Manager for IMAX theatres.

experiences.company: Brasíl das Águas / The Waters of Brazil
experiences.title: Logistics and Innovation Specialist
experiences.description:
- Development and innovation support to a water analysis unit installed inside an amphibious aircraft.
- Project logistics planning. 
- Marketing support.

experiences.company: Hughes-JVC, Sales Representative Office in Brazil
experiences.title: Business Development Manager
experiences.description:
- Digital cinema and projector sales.
- Host and organizer of the 1st Latin American Digital Cinema exhibition in 1999.

education.school: Pontifícia Universidade Católica do Rio de Janeiro
education.description: Bachelor’s in Software and Hardware Engineering — Pontifical Catholic University of Rio de Janeiro (PUC-Rio). Specialized in telecom networks and remote network management and distribution. Final project involved game theory.
education.activities_and_societies: Atividades e grupos:Founded the Computer Engineering Student Council.

education.school: The British School Rio de Janeiro

recommendations:
Matt Szabo

It was an absolute pleasure working with Yuri while at BroadSign - not only is he a leading force in the digital media industry in South America I must say he is one of the pioneers as well.  His skills as a Sales Director come from a natural ability of bringing people and ideas together and making projects happen.  I really enjoyed the technically savvy challenges Yuri and his customers brought forth, as well as the Spanish and Portuguese demos we performed together.  Yuri is a highly respected, key figure in this industry.  He is a Mover and a Shaker.
